value.0:
Flag standards are often used on the battlefield as a rallying point for soldiers.

This flag bears the symbol of Lathander, also called the Morninglord, the god of the spring, dawn, birth, and renewal, a god of beginning and hidden potential, a deity of conception, vitality, youth, renewal, and self-perfection. He is the commander of creativity. 

Lathander is a god of beginnings, and even individuals who worship other gods still offer a prayer to him at the start of a journey of endeavor. Lathander's name is invoked to seal alliances and start new ventures or companies. As a result, Lathander is very popular among the merchant classes, and has benefited accordingly.
Flag standards are often used on the battlefield as a rallying point for soldiers.
